About.title: About Us
About.intro: Bela Vida was born from a fundamental belief: true beauty comes from skin health. Based on years of dermatological research, we formulate products that respect, protect, and enhance your skin's natural barrier.
About.missionText: We merge science, nature, and luxury to deliver highly effective dermo-cosmetic solutions that transform your skincare routine into an elegant daily ritual.
About.scienceText: Every drop is meticulously formulated without harsh chemicals, utilizing clinically proven active ingredients to ensure maximum efficacy without compromising pureness.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.description: Have a question? We're here to help you design your perfect skincare routine.
